🔭 Telemetry Pipeline Restoration

feat/telemetry-hygiene — interactive playground. What PR #959 silently killed, how it was found, and what this PR restores.

The regression, on a timeline

2026-03-06  PR #959 "PostToolUse: 17→3 sub-hooks" reworks hooks.json
            └─ the whole "Skill" matcher block vanishes — handler stays registered, dispatch gone
2026-03-06  ■ skill-usage.log freezes        (same day — exact mtime match)
2026-03-06  ■ feedback/skill-usage.json freezes
2026-04-xx  PR #2154 builds channel-telemetry ON TOP of the dead hook → born dead
2026-05-xx  M168 ships skill_invocation SQLite table — fed ONLY by the dead hook → 0 rows ever
2026-07-09  ◆ this PR: /doctor slow-hook probe → E2E flow check → 3 parallel root-cause agents
            └─ dispatch restored, inventory rewritten, dead schema-lock delisted

Dispatch flow — toggle the fix

Skill tool call ──▶ PreToolUse ──▶ hooks.json matchers: Bash │ Write|Edit │ mcp__* │ Agent │ Read …
                                            ✗ no "Skill" matcher — CC never dispatches
                                                       │
                         entries/pretool.ts:135  'pretool/skill/skill-tracker' registered, unreachable
                                                       ▼
        💀 .claude/logs/skill-usage.log   💀 sessions.db skill_invocation (0 rows / 538,908 uses)
        💀 .claude/logs/skill-channels.jsonl (main)
Skill tool call ──▶ PreToolUse ──▶ matchers: Bash │ Write|Edit │ Skill ◆restored │ mcp__* │ Agent …
                                                       │ async t=5 (telemetry-only, never blocks)
                                                       ▼
                                    pretool/skill/skill-tracker
                                     ├─▶ ✅ skill-usage.log            (plaintext fallback)
                                     ├─▶ ✅ sessions.db skill_invocation (M168 — finally fed)
                                     └─▶ ✅ skill-channels.jsonl main   (#2154 — finally alive)

All findings shipped in this bundle

File / streamVerdictAction
skill-channels.jsonl (main) + skill-usage.log + skill_invocation DEAD — #959 Skill matcher block restored in hooks.json (async, t=5)
feedback/skill-usage.json DEAD — superseded Delisted from SCHEMA_LOCKED (8→7); validator kept for back-compat
logs/decisions.jsonl NEVER-BORN Inventory now says the truth: schema + 3 readers shipped, producer never built
telemetry/image-responses.jsonl CONDITIONAL No change — fires only on inline image bytes; absence is legit
telemetry-inventory.md ROTTED (Apr 23) Full rewrite: 7 locked + ~33 live writers + deprecated table, per-writer hook paths
.claude/logs/ budget FIXED (local) 46M → 2M active; 158 rotations + 6,846 dead-writer files archived (not in PR)
platform total_failed + attribution UPSTREAM Filed Yonatan-HQ/platform#7012

How it was caught

/doctor (slow hooks) ─▶ E2E flow verify (session→shim→API→Langfuse) ─▶ telemetry-inspect
                                                                            │
                              coordination DB read: skill_invocation = 0 ◀────┘
                              …while pluginUsage showed 538,908 skill uses — the contradiction
                              that unmasked the dead dispatch. 3 parallel agents traced it to #959.
Generated 2026-07-09 · feat/telemetry-hygiene · verification: hooks build ✓, plugin regen ✓, suite run in PR checks
